title: Army Engineer: Total Warfare
body:
## Introduction (no way):
**With the help of create mod, valkyrien skies, Big Cannons, clockwork and at this point I don't even know, how many other mods, you can design, create and engineer your dream vehicle of DESTRUCTION AND VICTORY!**

## Meaningless Info:
This modpack just like my previous one is forked from **[hammer](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hammer)**! But this time depending on what are you doing, you might feel some serious stutters sometimes if you're on low-end hardware like me. Maybe even have bad ping for no reason. I recommend making a dedicated server, but with such a modpack with this magnitude of mods, I made  that as an optional choice, with the solution below:

## Multiplayer:
Essential should work fine, but in some cases it might cause unexpected crashes. The modpack has e4mc preinstalled by default (guide on how to use it can be found at the bottom of changelog).

## Other stuff:
The modpack was NOT made to be played in survival originally! If you like the hustle then go for it, but I originally intended it to be played in creative mode

### Useful links for builds using ComputerCraft:
**[CC: Tweaked wiki](https://tweaked.cc/)**

**[CC:C Bridge wiki](https://cccbridge.kleinbox.dev/peripherals/)**

## What is happening?
May have noticed the modpack name change.

Mainly for stability reasons I'm splitting this modpack into specialized modpacks. There will be 3 more modpacks:
- **1 focused on combat resembling what humanity had before the 1980s** (Mainly simple tanks, planes, ships and infantry (ironically has modern weapons))
- **1 focused on space combat** (So spaceships with weapons and stuff)
- **1 focused on modern day combat.** (Advanced tech, nukes and much more, but with warium being the main focus)

### This modpack?
This modpack won't disappear anytime soon! And also it will be basically the full feature experience, but with some quirks though.

# Now go! BUILD! CONQUER YOUR WORLD!
